approvalSource: Steve told the builder to continue from repo truth after the Foundation KB/action review child queue shipped, with no live extraction, auth-required or paid runs, external writes, Drive permission mutation, Agent Feedback auto-send, hidden subagents, or Harlan/Fal/voice/Canva/OpenHuman feature work.
scopeSummary: Close the Foundation KB/action-review sprint umbrella after verifying every child card and closeout is done, current plan/state name the result, and no hidden worker/extraction/model/external-write side effects are introduced.
constraints: No transcript fetch, screenshot capture, crawl, summarization, model call, or provider probe.
No hidden subagent or delegated worker launch.
No automatic deletion, hiding, rejection, snoozing, or external apply of review items.
requiredProof: focused proof verifies every child card is done and every child closeout key is registered
focused proof dogfoods missing child, stale umbrella, missing closeout, and forbidden runtime side-effect tokens
live Current Sprint metadata is complete before closeout
current plan and current state name the umbrella closeout
backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, and process:foundation-ship pass
notes: This is an umbrella closeout only. It removes ambiguous parent-sprint state without changing child behavior or starting approval-bound runtime work.
